LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CONOR NUGENT AND 1233 POLK STREET LLC'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE TO LIMITED JURISDICTION IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON OCTOBER 3, 2012, AT 9:30 A.M. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CONOR NUGENT AND 1233 POLK STREET LLC'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE TO LIMITED JURISDICTION IS DENIED, MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHOW THAT (1) PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES COULD NOT POSSIBLY BE $25,000 OR GREATER. (2) INJUNCTIVE RELIEF IS UNLIMITED JURISDICTION MATTER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Reclassify Case To Limited Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Ariel M. Gershon of Greenstein & McDonald Attorneys at Law (415-773-1240) appearing for plaintiff Joshua Condie opposing party.
Atty. Steven W. Yuen of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (415-788-1900) appearing for defendant Conor Nugent and 1233 Polk St. LLC. moving party.

Argued - Tentative ruling is adopted, DEFENDANT CONOR NUGENT and 1233 POLK STREET LLC's Motion To Reclassify Case To Limited Jurisdiction is Denied, moving party failed to show that (1) plaintiff's damages could not possibly be $25,000 or greater. (2) Injunctive relief is unlimited jurisdiction matter. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
